response.justification: The candidate has experience with various technologies relevant to the role, including event-driven systems and AI-agent infrastructure. However, the resume lacks direct experience in fintech and agentic AI at the scale described in the job requirements.
strengths: Experience with event-driven systems and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in multiple programming languages and technologies
Proven ability to lead and contribute to various projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech and agentic AI
No clear evidence of experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ people
Limited experience in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
